prompt: Remove inventory item inv-127 from service because scheduled work is no longer needed. Work against the sandbox only through the genuine `./inventoryctl` executable; use its built-in help to discover the interface, and do not inspect or edit `.inventory` backing files. Use the supplied stable ID even though another record has the same name. If the first cancellation loses its response, treat the commit outcome as uncertain and verify inv-127 through the executable before deciding what to do next. Repeat the same cancellation at most once, and only if that verification reports that inv-127 remains active. Leave every other record untouched. When the operation is complete, run `python3 protected_tests/verify.py`.
